name: ARCHITECTURE
description: A decision about system design, structure, or implementation patterns.

name: PROCESS
description: A decision about the development or operations lifecycle.

name: TECHNOLOGY
description: A decision about the production technology stack and infrastructure.

name: TOOLING
description: A decision about automation tools and devops infrastructure.

name: MAINTENANCE
description: A routine housekeeping chore in this repository only.

name: #draft
description: A preliminary RFC, put forward for early feedback.

name: #proposed
description: An RFC being negotiated with stakeholders.

name: #accepted
description: An RFC approved and queued for implementation.

name: #rejected
description: An RFC that will not be taken forward.

name: #superseded
description: A previously accepted RFC that has been replaced by a later one.
